'''Vuurok I'pan''' was a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] living in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]] after it was [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

==Biography==
While on a conquered [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], I'pan learned of the redemption of [[Vua Rapuung]], and took to it. Later, he was transferred to Yuuzhan'tar, the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and joined [[Niiriit Esh|Niirit Esh]]'s group of rogue Shamed Ones. On a scouting expedition, I'pan ran across [[Nom Anor]], who had recently fled after the [[Battle of Ebaq|debacle]] at [[Ebaq 9]]. Vuurok said that he was just a worker who got lost from his detail, but Nom Anor realized that he was lying, and demanded that I'pan take him to where he was going. But when I'pan asked if Nom Anor was a Shamed One, Anor beat him with such savagery that Anor himself was wounded. When I'pan brought him to his group of [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' worshipping]] [[Shamed Ones]], they accepted him into their community, and I'pan told him the tale of Vua Rapuung in a dramatic style. Vuurok I'pan was believed killed when [[Warrior caste|Warriors]] came across their settlement.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
